title: HTX (Huobi) - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserves donation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK donateToReserves() if preceded by FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: Hackers exploited a flash loan to drain liquidity from a lending protocol and then donated the funds to reserves, draining the protocol's funds. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
